name: Circuit breaker state machine
task: Create /tmp/eval_cb/cb.py with class CircuitBreaker(failure_threshold, recovery_timeout). States: 'closed', 'open', 'half_open'. Methods: allow_request(now) returns whether a request may proceed; record_success() and record_failure(now) update state. Transitions: in closed, failure_threshold consecutive failures → open; in open, after recovery_timeout seconds since opening → half_open on next allow_request; in half_open, only one probe request allowed at a time — success returns to closed and resets failures, failure returns to open and restarts the timer. Expose `state` as a string attribute.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_cb/cb.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); cb = mod.CircuitBreaker(3, 5.0); assert cb.allow_request(0.0); cb.record_failure(0.0); cb.record_failure(0.1); cb.record_failure(0.2); assert not cb.allow_request(0.3); assert not cb.allow_request(4.9); assert cb.allow_request(5.5); assert not cb.allow_request(5.6); cb.record_success(); assert cb.allow_request(5.7); cb.record_failure(6.0); cb.record_failure(6.1); cb.record_failure(6.2); assert not cb.allow_request(6.3); assert cb.allow_request(11.5); cb.record_failure(11.6); assert not cb.allow_request(15.0); assert cb.allow_request(16.7); print('OK')
